action.reasoning: Observation: Latest larger model (3072-dim/7-layer/d=0.05) got val AP~0.224 but test AP regressed to 0.209 (from best 0.219); train.py truncated (no jsonl metrics, curves outdated from iter8, incomplete val func at 'mean_'); loss~0.001 suggests overfitting. PyG still segfaults. Analysis: Excess capacity overfits FP reps despite BN/pos_weight/masking/scheduler; smaller arch (2048/6/0.1) generalized better before. Complete compact train.py needed for full DataLoader loop, per-epoch jsonl logging (epoch/loss/val_ap/lr), grad_clip, non-truncated robust AP (nan-filtered, >5 valid samples). Decision: Edit model.py to update defaults (2048/6/0.1), fully rewrite compact complete train.py (DataLoader bs=8192, ReduceLROnPlateau patience=25, 100 epochs, logging+best on val_ap), update predict.py to match; train then submit_eval on best.pt to recover/improve AP.
